title: Scopper Gaban Tests Luffy
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on Nami, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Saul, Unknown person #12, Giants as Luffy, Zoro, and Nami push toward freeing Loki while Scopper Gaban tests them and God’s Knights begin a darker move against Elbaf’s children.
scene: Luffy, Zoro, and Nami push toward freeing Loki while Scopper Gaban tests them and God’s Knights begin a darker move against Elbaf’s children.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Franky's Group (The Treasure Tree Adam)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Unbelievable, Adam wood as far as the eye can see!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and I thought it was meant to be rare! HAHAHA!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wow! I had no idea it was so valuable overseas!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Maybe I should start selling some on the side!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: weren't you sent here to keep an eye on me?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Saul seemed pretty strict about it. He was all like:

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: *It's a sacred tree, bucko! Don't go Cuttin' it down now, ya hear?!*

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Ahahaha! You sound just like him!:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Still, I guess stealing from under the noses of giants is a tall order...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Maybe that explains the markup.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hm? What's that?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It's a mural!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It's graffiti from eows ago...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Some kids probably echoed right into the bark and it got fossilized.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's now designated as a cultural heritage site, thanks to its enormous historical value...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is a punk's doodle that big a deal?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...It's said to date back somewhere between 900 and 800 years ago.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: If that's true...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then that would place it right in the middle of the void century!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: WhAA-??!

dialogue.speaker: Saul
dialogue.text: We gotta show Robin!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: SHELL BE THRILLED!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I have a

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey... Aunt this drawing kinda odd for old Elbaf? Not all the figures look like giants...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: quite. As far as we know...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There were definitely times where the races of the world flashed...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But this kind of cooperation is unheard of!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The first time I was in the morning, and I was

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: That's why I think...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: ...it was probably just some kid's dream.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: WAAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: KyAah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Class is in session everyone, listen up.

dialogue.text: Kya ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha

dialogue.text: Owl library

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: So this is the Harley...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Yep!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Woah! It's so big.. and old!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This pretty tone here preserved many of the rich myths and legends of Elbaf!

dialogue.text: BwHAL
